description_long: This is a handmade ceramic cup with a rounded, slightly irregular cylindrical body and a prominent handle attached to one side. The cup features a gradient of colors, transitioning from a light, almost white upper rim to a darker, earthy gray at the base, with subtle horizontal ridges and a slightly wavy surface texture. The handle is thick and robust, though it appears somewhat deformed or chipped, especially at the lower attachment point. The interior of the cup is smooth and glazed, matching the lighter tones of the exterior upper rim. The surface finish is matte with visible textural imperfections, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. There are no visible logos, branding, or decorative patterns on the cup.
description: A rustic, handmade ceramic cup with a thick, slightly deformed handle and a gradient from light to dark gray, featuring a matte, textured finish.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup from an angle highlighting the handle's attachment and its chipped or incomplete lower section, as well as the cup's textured, ridged body.
description_view_1: The cup is seen from the front, displaying the smooth, rounded rim and the subtle color gradient, with the handle mostly hidden behind the body.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the cup's continuous cylindrical form and the full, curved handle, with the lighter upper rim and darker base clearly visible.
description_view_3: The back view focuses on the handle, showing its irregular, possibly broken lower part, and the cup's overall matte, textured surface.
